macro.title: New-home purchase applications slip 2.4% year over year in April
macro.what: New-home purchase applications are down year over year in April as higher rates push more buyers into FHA and VA loans.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Iran Tensions, Not Economic Data, Are Driving Mortgage Rates This Week
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Rates are likely to move more on headlines out of Iran than on economic data
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: CrossCountry Mortgage expands RON, eNote closings with Blend
housing.what: CrossCountry Mortgage uses Blend Close to support RON and eNote, cutting average closing time to 45 minutes and enabling quicker closings.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Pending home sales rise 1.4% in April, NAR says
housing.what: NAR says pending home sales rose 1.4% in April to 74.8, up 3.2% year over year, with monthly gains led by the Northeast.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: What happens if Zillow loses MRED listings tonight?
housing.what: Zillow seeks an injunction as MRED threatens to cut IDX and VOW access by 11:59 p.m
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Rocket Mortgage, Redfin introduce savings program valued at up to $20K
housing.what: Rocket Mortgage and Redfin introduced a select-market incentive combining lender credits and commission discounts, capped at $20,000.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Prices Drops Are Becoming Slightly Less Common As Housing Market Stabilizes
housing.what: The share of home sellers cutting their asking prices has fallen from its peak as buyers lose a bit of negotiating power, but price drops are still much more common than in years past
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Rose 0.2% in April
housing.what: Improving homebuyer demand could fuel further price gains in the coming months
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Inside the $150,000 Hamptons Trailer This Couple Turned Into a Dream Home
housing.what: Born and raised in Hampton Bays, NY, Taylor Jayne always imagined she’d build her life in the place that raised her
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $400,000 Buys in These Hot U.S. Neighborhoods
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at some of the hottest real estate markets in the country, according to Redfin’s latest analysis
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Opendoor’s ‘grand reopening’: Courting agents with a new RealScout integration
